articles.title: Developer vows to present more ‘options’ for Davis Square tower project amid neighborhood opposition
articles.description:
“The likelihood is, if we can't find a way to work together,” Flynn said, “that site will likely sit fallow for the next 10 to 15 years.” 

The post Developer vows to present more ‘options’ for Davis Square tower project amid neighborhood opposition appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Developer Flynn plans to offer new options for the controversial Davis Square tower project.
Neighborhood opposition could delay the project, leaving the site unused for 10 to 15 years.
Local residents may face prolonged disruption and missed opportunities for development in Davis Square.

articles.title: He’s running the Boston Marathon for his 2 nephews with down syndrome
articles.description:
"I’m running for Sebastian’s memory and for Zachary’s future."

The post He’s running the Boston Marathon for his 2 nephews with down syndrome appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Steven Ponte is running the Boston Marathon to honor his nephews with Down syndrome.
He aims to raise awareness and funds for Down syndrome support organizations.
The marathon takes place on April 17, 2023, impacting local community support efforts.
